name: com.halalterminal/mcp
title: Halal Terminal
description: 22 tools for halal investing: screen stocks and ETFs across 5 Shariah methodologies (AAOIFI, DJIM, FTSE, MSCI, S&P), audit portfolios, calculate zakat and dividend purification, fetch market data, news and SEC filings. Free tier available.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Halal Terminal API key (prefix ht_). Free tier available at https://api.halalterminal.com — email-only signup, no credit card.

environmentVariables.name: HALALTERMINAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Halal Terminal API key (prefix ht_). Free tier available at https://api.halalterminal.com — email-only signup, no credit card.
